review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-100-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.description: The staged Claude review could not cross-check unit_count=10 against the S15(M05) to S04(M06) enumerated range because the plan file was not part of the staged diff. Plan binding is documented in the CP00-100 manifest and enforced by closeout-pack-plan validation.

original_review_findings.description: Relocating CP00-099 from current_pack to permission_audit_binding_pack dropped prior validator assertions on risk_class and production_ready_flag.

CORE_DOMAIN_PERMISSION_AUDIT_FIXTURE_CONTRACT.forbidden_claims aliased CORE_DOMAIN_PERMISSION_AUDIT_BINDING_CONTRACT.forbidden_claims instead of carrying the fixture's own explicit no-real-data/no-write list.
The loading state declared secondary_interaction 'inspect_audit_hint' even though loading.actions only included 'inspect_fixture_summary'.
Unit count could not be cross-checked against the staged diff because the plan file was not included in that review diff.

notes: All P2 findings from the single valid Claude review were fixed after review and covered by post-review tests and validators.
The remaining P3 is a staged-review visibility caveat only; CP00-100 plan binding is enforced by the pack manifest and closeout-pack-plan validation.
